LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING RE: DEFENDANT BRIDGE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. THE MATTER IS CONTESTED. ARGUMENT IS HELD. AT THE CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: BPMC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS NOT RULED UPON ARE PRESERVED FOR APPEAL. (CCP 437C(Q).). THE COURT TO REVIEW THE PROPOSED ORDER SUBMITTED BY MS. CATLOS. JUDGE: ROCHELLE C. EAST. CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA. LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING RE: DEFENDANT BRIDGE HOUSING CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. THE MATTER IS OFF CALENDAR AS DUPLICATE. THE NOTICE OF ERRATA FILED APRIL 24, 2024, CLARIFIES THAT PLAINTIFF'S EMPLOYER IS BRIDGE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT COMPANY (BPMC), BUT IT WAS ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS BRIDGE HOUSING CORPORATION. BPMC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED ON APRIL 26, 2024, IS THUS THE OPERATIVE MOTION. JUDGE: ROCHELLE C. EAST. CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA. NOT REPORTED. BAILIFF: NGUYEN. (301/RCE)

Off Calendar Aug-08-2024 Set For Case Management Conference On Nov-13-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Aug-02-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jelani Dotson, Tel. 510.671.4352, Plaintiff and Self-Represented Litigant, appearing in person;
Katherine Catlos, Esq. of Kaufman Dolowich, Tel. 415.926.7600, appearing in person for Defendant Bridge Housing Corporation.

Hearing re: DEFENDANT BRIDGE HOUSING CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION.

The matter is Off calendar as duplicate. The notice of errata filed April 24, 2024, clarifies that plaintiff's employer is BRIDGE Property Management Company (BPMC), but it was erroneously sued as Bridge Housing Corporation. BPMC's motion for summary judgment filed on April 26, 2024, is thus the operative motion.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported. Bailiff: Nguyen. (301/RCE)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-02-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jelani Dotson, Tel. 510.671.4352, Plaintiff and Self-Represented Litigant, appearing in person;
Katherine Catlos, Esq. of Kaufman Dolowich LLP, Tel. 415.926.7600, appearing in person for Defendant Bridge Housing Corporation.

Hearing re: DEFENDANT BRIDGE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

The matter is contested. Argument is held.

At the conclusion of argument, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

BPMC's motion for summary judgment is granted. Evidentiary objections not ruled upon are preserved for appeal. (CCP 437c(q).).

The Court to review the proposed order submitted by Ms. Catlos.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Court Reporter: Raquel Sharp, CSR #10619, Tel. 925.226.8222, Email: raquel@transcriptlegal.com. (301/RCE)
